meaning: n.尼日尔(非洲中西部国家)
examples: Representatives of each of these countries attended the meeting in Geneva, together with Egypt, Nigeria, and Niger.
We were walking along the bank of the Niger river, searching for the tracks of a hippopotamus that was ravaging the corn on Karim's farm.
While height increased in Uganda and Niger during the early 20th century, the trend has reversed in recent years, with height decreasing among 18-year-olds.
Ed Kashi's work in the Niger Delta documents the existential nightmare of what oil wealth means in reality.
In 1972, he undertook with various actors (including the then 28-year-old Helen Mirren) a research tour of Algeria, Niger, Nigeria and Mali.
